subject: [PATCH v3 2/2] mm: mglru: promote mapped executable folios after first usage

reviews.author: Baolin Wang
reviews.summary: Reviewer Baolin Wang apologized for intermixing refactoring work with functional changes, and promised to submit the refactoring as a separate patch in the future.
reviews.raw_body:
Ha, sure. Sorry for mixing in a helper replacement. I'll split it out 
into a separate patch next time. :)

2026-07-17.patch_summary: This patch promotes mapped executable folios to the active list after their first usage, improving performance by reducing the number of page faults and increasing the efficiency of memory allocation.
